There actually *was* a project to make the Great Lakes ports into legit seaports! It’s called the St. Lawrence Seaway and it was built in 1959. And it was mostly obsolete by the time it was finished and it *did* wreak havoc on our freshwater wildlife.

The completion of the St. Lawrence put a stop to nearly all U.S. naval activity on Lake Ontario (their biggest ship was the 60 gun frigate Superior). In reply, the U.S. laid down the Chippewa and the New Orleans, each with more guns than St. Lawrence. Neither was completed.
